name: Basil Grilled Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Press 3/4 teaspoon pepper into the meaty sides of chicken breast halves.
2. Combine 1/3 cup melted butter and 1/4 cup chopped basil in a bowl; stir well.
3. Brush chicken lightly with the melted butter mixture.
4. In a small bowl, combine 1/2 cup softened butter, 2 tablespoons minced basil, grated Parmesan cheese, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Beat until smooth.
5. Transfer to a serving dish and set aside.
6. Grill chicken over medium coals for 8 to 10 minutes on each side, basting frequently with the remaining melted butter mixture.
7. Serve grilled chicken with the basil-butter mixture. Garnish with fresh basil sprigs if desired.
Serves 4
